text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
This is great! Check out the stands—everybody's
going wild!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Loads of folks called out to me on the way here.
Reckon they're expecting me to do well.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I really can't lose now! My heart's about to burst
with excitement!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'll beat Suzuka and everybody else. And after
that, I'm gonna clinch the rest of the G1 sprints
too!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh... you're lookin' a tad nervous, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Well, turn that frown upside down!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Que sera sera. Whatever happens happens.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Or rather, whatever I want to happen happens!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Next stop, the finish line! Just take it easy and
wait for me there, Trainer!
